headline: Is senior housing sexy? One multimillionaire gambled on it amid COVID — and turned it into a $160 billion business
summary: The oldest boomers are turning 80 this year, and demand for senior housing is soaring.

headline: Welltower (WELL) Stock Looks Fully Valued After A 212% Run
summary: Welltower stock has delivered a very strong 212.5% total return over the past three years, yet its valuation picture is more restrained, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to a roughly fair price while market multiples suggest the shares are on the expensive side. After such a run, the stock no longer looks obviously cheap, and the question is whether current expectations for senior housing demand and earnings are already fully reflected in the price. Over...

headline: Welltower: Continued Property Acquisitions Support The Investment Case
summary: Welltower gets a buy for my initial rating, as it presents both a compelling dividend idea and a capital growth idea. Learn more about WELL stock here.
